title: Systems, methods, and devices for signaling for power saving
abstract: Systems, Methods, Devices, and Apparatuses for power saving are provided. In at least one embodiment, a device may be configured for discontinuous reception (DRX) mode and further receive signaling indicating whether or not to wake and/or may receiving signaling indicating whether or not to go-to-sleep. The signaling may be implemented as group-specific signaling.
claims: 1. A processor configured to: receive a first configuration for a connected mode discontinuous reception (C-DRX) mode and a second configuration for receiving a wake-up indication in a first downlink control information (DCI) format on a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH), wherein the first DCI format includes a plurality of UE specific fields; monitor, based at least in part on the second configuration, for the first DCI format during an OFF/non-active state of the C-DRX mode, wherein one or more fields of the plurality of UE specific fields of the first DCI format include a 1 bit indication to indicate whether or not there is a wake up indication, wherein a first value of the 1 bit indication corresponds to a wake up signal being detected, and wherein a second value of the 1 bit indication corresponds to a wake up signal not being detected; and wake up, based at least in part on receiving the first DCI format with the 1 bit indication of the wake up indication, at a start of a next C-DRX ON duration associated with the first configuration, for downlink signal monitoring.
